Magellan
Record · 12 waiting
Today · 9:04 AM
What should I handle first?9:04
Magellan · 9:04
Of the 12 waiting, three are time-sensitive — but only one actually costs you money to ignore: the Kunming hydrangea reorder. $38K/week if it stocks out, and that’s in 3 days. The other two can sit until tomorrow with no cost.

The rest are routine. Want me to send the two standard reorder POs and leave the judgment calls for you?
Scoped to Record

What’s waiting on your decision. What’s already been done.

Needs you now3 urgent · $38K/wk at stake
Operationsflagged 6h ago$38K/wk at stake
Reorder hydrangeas from Kunming — stockout in 3 days
Down to 40 stems at current velocity. Kunming air freight + cold storage runs 4 days, so a PO has to go today to avoid a gap during the weekend wedding orders.
From inventory monitor · cross-checked against next 14 days of orders
Growth5h ago$800/day wasted
Pause Cylinder Vase Meta ads — product is out of stock
Spending $800/day driving traffic to a product with zero inventory. 21 units of demand in the last 7 days with nothing to sell — every click is paid for and lost.
From ad spend monitor · seen 2:14 PM
Operations3h ago2 POs · $70K
Two purchase orders need your sign-off before they send
Kunming Flowers $48K and Belgian Cocoa $22K. Quantities come from your 14-day demand forecast plus safety stock — drafted and ready, just need approval to go to suppliers.
Sitting9 open · no cost to wait
Customers4 days agodeliverability
Sunset the lapsed VIP segment in Klaviyo
247 contacts haven’t opened in 180 days. Cleaning them improves your sender reputation and inbox placement for everyone else.
Growth2 days ago+8% open est.
Ship Welcome flow v2 — replaces the current sequence
The refreshed welcome flow is ready in your Library. Magellan estimates +8% open rate from the new subject line. Swapping it in is one click.
From Library · “Welcome flow open rate dropped 8%”
Finance6 days agomargin
Review the free-shipping threshold
Small orders under $1,200 are shipping at a loss after last-mile cost. Raising the free-ship floor to $1,500 protects margin without hurting AOV, based on your order distribution.
